metadata.description: Jonathan Dick's collection of portable, cross-agent skills for Claude Code, Copilot CLI, and friends.

plugins.name: skill-reflect
plugins.description: Post-session reflection on distributed skill performance. Detects friction, classifies it, proposes a concrete fix plus a verifiable eval, scrubs PII, and writes a local Markdown report. Filing a GitHub issue requires an explicit second consent. Ships opt-in SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks that stage a tiny local marker (no AI, no network) and offer a non-blocking review nudge.
